description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa with a boxy, geometric silhouette and clean lines. The seat and backrest feature two large, uniform cushions each, upholstered in a smooth, medium-gray fabric with subtle button tufting at the center of each cushion. The armrests are straight, wide, and extend at the same height as the backrest, creating a cohesive rectangular frame. The sofa's exterior, including the arms and back, is covered in a contrasting black material, likely faux leather or vinyl, giving it a contemporary look. The legs are short, slightly tapered, and appear to be made of dark wood, positioned at each corner for stability. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern outdoor patios.
description: A modern, boxy two-seater sofa with gray tufted cushions, black exterior upholstery, and short dark wooden legs. The design is clean and contemporary, suitable for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows two large gray seat and back cushions with button tufting, framed by black armrests and a black base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the straight, wide black armrest and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a solid black back panel with no visible seams or detailing, emphasizing the sofa's rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the straight armrest and the profile of the cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all attached and featuring central button tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, wide, and rectangular armrests at the same height as the backrest, fully upholstered in black material with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, slightly tapered legs made of dark wood, positioned at each corner and exposed beneath the sofa.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with two attached cushions, each with a single button tuft.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth texture and subtle button tufting on the cushions; no visible decorative stitching or patterned fabric.
